name: Speedy Cash
description_short: Speedy Cash offers payday loans up to $425, lines of credit up to $4,000, and title loans up to $4,000 with same-day or next-day funding at physical store locations.
description_long:
Speedy Cash is a storefront lender operating multiple locations across Memphis, Tennessee and other states, providing short-term personal lending solutions to consumers needing quick access to cash. The company has been established as a neighborhood lending option, with the Memphis Summer Avenue location open Monday-Friday (9am-7pm/6pm) and Saturday (9am-4pm), closed Sundays.

Speedy Cash offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans up to $425 with repayment due on or around the next payday; Lines of Credit up to $4,000 with flexible draw amounts and repayment over time; and Title Loans up to $4,000 using vehicle collateral. The company emphasizes transparency, stating borrowers "will know exactly how much it costs to borrow the funds prior to signing your loan agreement." Applications can be completed in-store with staff assistance or started online. All loan products require standard documentation: government-issued ID, proof of employment/income, working phone number, valid email, and proof of address.

Speedy Cash differentiates itself through in-store service, positioning the retail experience as an advantage for customers who prefer face-to-face guidance through the application and signing process. The company also offers ancillary money services including check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, and Green Dot Visa debit cards at most locations. The company maintains a customer service phone line (1-888-333-1360) and Spanish-language support (1-855-734-0111).

As a short-term lender, Speedy Cash serves consumers facing immediate cash needs, though the high-cost nature of payday and title loans means borrowers should carefully evaluate terms and repayment ability. The company operates within state lending regulations but charges typical rates associated with emergency lending products, which can result in significant total borrowing costs if loans are rolled over or renewed.
address: 3447 E Cesar E Chavez Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90063

company_info.headquarters: 3447 E Cesar E Chavez Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90063

pros: Payday loans available up to $425 with next-payday repayment, enabling quick small-dollar borrowing
Lines of Credit up to $4,000 with flexible draw amounts and repayment over time, not lump-sum due dates
Title loans up to $4,000 using vehicle collateral for larger emergency borrowing needs
In-store application support with staff guidance through terms, application, and signing process
Transparent pricing: borrowers know exact costs before signing loan agreement
Ancillary money services (check cashing, wire transfers, money orders) available at most locations
Multiple store locations in Memphis area with extended weekday hours (7pm closings Monday/Friday)
Bilingual customer support available (English and Spanish)
cons: Short-term loan products (payday/title loans) typically carry high APRs and fees, making them expensive relative to traditional loans
Payday loans capped at $425 limits usefulness for larger emergencies; only title loans offer $4,000+ amounts
In-store application requirement may be inconvenient for customers unable to visit physical locations during business hours
Vehicle title loans require clear title in most states, excluding borrowers with outstanding liens
No online loan approval or funding mentioned; online applications must be completed in-store, requiring store visit anyway
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs ($100-$425) before their next paycheck who have steady employment
Borrowers needing $1,000-$4,000 who own vehicles with clear titles and prefer flexible repayment over lump-sum payday loans
Unbanked or underbanked customers seeking check cashing, wire transfers, or money services alongside emergency lending
Customers who prefer in-person guidance and face-to-face service over online-only lenders
diagnosis: Speedy Cash is best for consumers facing immediate cash emergencies who need $100-$4,000 within 1-2 business days and can visit a physical store location. The main caveat is that payday and title loans carry substantial APRs and fees typical of high-cost lending products; borrowers should only use these services as a last resort and have a clear repayment plan to avoid debt cycles.
services: Green Dot Visa Debit Card services
In-store loan applications with staff assistance
